description: Sample resume data for a mid-level software engineer, demonstrating complete structured format

resume_data.summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and microservices. Proficient in Python, TypeScript, and cloud technologies. Delivered 10+ production features serving 1M+ users with 99.9% uptime. Passionate about clean architecture, automated testing, and mentoring junior engineers.

work_experience.title: Software Engineer II
work_experience.description:
Developed and maintained backend microservices for e-commerce platform.
Built RESTful and GraphQL APIs handling 500K+ daily requests.
Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through onboarding and code review processes.
Reduced database query latency by 60% through query optimization and indexing improvements.

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
work_experience.description:
Built full-stack features for SaaS analytics platform using React, TypeScript, and Python.
Developed real-time data visualization dashboard serving 200+ enterprise customers.
Implemented automated testing suite achieving 85% code coverage across frontend and backend.
Collaborated with product and design teams to launch 8 major features in 2 years.

projects.name: OpenAPI Code Generator
projects.description: Open-source CLI tool that generates TypeScript API clients from OpenAPI specs. 500+ GitHub stars.

projects.name: Distributed Task Scheduler
projects.description: Distributed job scheduling system supporting priority queues and retry logic. Processes 100K+ tasks/day.
